---
title: "Frank’s Debt"
---

## Frank’s Debt

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** London: Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34 King Street, Covent Garden.

### Notes

Also in collection, <i>Lads and Lasses of Langley</i> (1881)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
